headlines: Bitcoin near $67–68K after post‑regulatory ‘sell the news’ dip
Ether holding near $2,000 as ETF outflows and macro pressure weigh
Bitcoin ETFs saw weak flows / recent outflows pressure markets

articles.title: Bitcoin stabilizes near $67–68K after regulatory-driven sell‑off
articles.summary: Bitcoin traded around $67–68K after a sharp pullback that followed recent U.S. regulatory milestones and a big options expiry—markets call it a classic “buy the rumor, sell the news” move.

articles.title: Ether hovers near $2,000 as macro headwinds and ETP outflows persist
articles.summary: Ether remained close to the $2,000 level amid weak market sentiment and recent outflows from spot Ether ETPs, leaving the token range‑bound for now.

articles.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs show recent outflows, signaling short‑term risk
articles.summary: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded notable net outflows in the latest week, reversing some earlier inflow momentum and weighing on near‑term BTC price action.

articles.title: Bittensor (TAO) cools after a 140% AI‑sector rally
articles.summary: TAO surged on AI narratives and then consolidated around $300–$320 after a 140% run—traders are watching for either a follow‑through or a profit‑taking correction.

articles.title: Chainlink (LINK) holds $8–$9 range as traders wait for catalyst
articles.summary: LINK traded in a tight $8–$9 band as volume eased and market participants paused for clearer direction—technicals show short‑term consolidation.

articles.title: XRP outperforms peers after regulatory clarity, but moves stay muted
articles.summary: XRP showed small gains as the market digested regulatory clarity around token classifications—price action remains careful without fresh ETF catalysts.

articles.title: Dogecoin faces selling pressure after a technical breakdown
articles.summary: DOGE slipped below key short‑term support, triggering selling pressure and raising the risk of further downside in the memecoin sector.

articles.title: BNP Paribas rolls out Bitcoin and Ethereum ETNs in Europe
articles.summary: Major bank BNP Paribas launched ETN products tied to Bitcoin and Ethereum for European investors, expanding regulated traditional finance access to crypto.
